title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 30 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 30 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 30 2026
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 30/01/2026
Today, the DCE iron ore market witnessed intense volatility. Following a decline in the morning session,the market oscillated during the afternoon. The benchmark contract, I2605, eventually closed at 791.5 RMB/tonne, edging up by 0.06% from the previous trading day.
